steps.assistant_text: Pair-dispatch handler, 93.1%->exact. The prior decode's structure was right but used PLACEHOLDER syms (gl_func_00000000/D_00000000) where the .s carries fully resolved relocs — wired real symbols (import_0010DB78, game_uso_func_0000D5BC x2, E91C, D8EC, D7F4, two DISTINCT data bases game_uso_D_807FF400+0xE10 / _807FF460+0xE70) per the resolved-reloc convention. Levers: *(Pair2*) by-value D-pair calls home a1/a2 to sp+4/8; inlined 0xB4 deref (t6) + 0x9CC test (bnezl dup-load); a0[0xFC/4] inlined twice so CSE creates the v0 candidate after the 0xB4 pseudo; param used directly (no s0 local).

metadata.verification: 48/48 word-exact incl all jal+lui reloc symbols + make ROM byte-identical (promoted)
